DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Stacey Brown, Esq. 310-492-5757 Schlehr Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Kathleen Choi, Esq. 213-239-9800 Ogletree Deakins Nash Smoak & Stewart for Defendant.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ARIZONA STATE UNIVERSITY, ARIZONA BOARD OF REGENTS DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Plaintiff's request for leave to substitute ASU with the Arizona Board of Regents is denied. (see word minutes for full details)

The court rules on Defendants' requests for judicial notice as followed: Exhibits 1 & 2 denied for lack of relevance; Exhibits 3 & 4 denied for lack of relevance/failure to show such unpublished orders are citable; Exhibit 5 denied as irrelevant; as persuasive authority, improper; Exhibit 6 granted; Exhibits 7-13, 15 denied as irrelevant; Exhibit 14 granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2023 Continued To Aug-25-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ARIZONA STATE UNIVERSITY, ARIZONA BOARD OF REGENTS' DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Continued to August 25, 2023, to be heard by Judge Quinn.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
